goal: Guide the Agent to semantically translate legacy EKP/JSP form scripts into restricted NewOA/MK DSL script patches. Deterministic code extracts evidence only; the Agent decides whether a patch is safe.
principles: Translate behavior, not source syntax. Legacy function names and regex-like shapes are evidence, not completion criteria.
Use form/source/dsl context, targetApi capabilities, function catalog semantics, row markers, and native formRules evidence together.
Prefer native formRules coverage when it fully covers behavior; otherwise generate small MKXFORM JavaScript using targetApi.
Keep unsupported, ambiguous, side-effect-heavy, or DOM-dependent behavior as needs_review/manual diagnostics.
Never emit DOM APIs in mapped output.

legacyApis.name: AttachXFormValueChangeEventById
legacyApis.semantic: Registers behavior that runs when a control value changes.
legacyApis.translationGuidance: Use the existing DSL action whose event is onChange and whose controlId/tableId matches the registered control. Do not create a new action.
legacyApis.safeWhen: The callback body can be expressed by native formRules or targetApi JavaScript inside that action.

legacyApis.name: Com_AddEventListener(window, "load", fn)
legacyApis.translationGuidance: Use the existing onLoad DSL action. Translate only initialization behavior that is fully represented in the source window and targetApi.
legacyApis.safeWhen: The source window contains a complete callback body and no unresolved residual behavior remains.

legacyApis.name: GetXFormFieldValueById
legacyApis.semantic: Reads a legacy form field value. Many legacy snippets read the first array item with [0].
legacyApis.translationGuidance: Use MKXFORM.getValue(fieldId). Normalize array or scalar values before comparisons.
legacyApis.safeWhen: The field id resolves in the DSL form or is explicitly preserved as source evidence for review.

legacyApis.name: SetXFormFieldValueById
legacyApis.semantic: Writes a legacy form field value.
legacyApis.translationGuidance: Use MKXFORM.setValue(fieldId, value) when the target field resolves and the value expression is safe.
legacyApis.safeWhen: No DOM object writes or hidden helper-only state are required.

legacyApis.name: common_dom_row_set_show_required_reset
legacyApis.semantic: Controls row or field visibility and required state; arguments usually mean rowId, visible, required, reset.
legacyApis.translationGuidance: If native formRules already cover the same row behavior, patch the action to omitted with coverage.status covered. If JavaScript must cover it, use MKXFORM.setFieldAttr(rowId, 5/4 for show/hide and 3/6 for required/not-required).
legacyApis.safeWhen: The referenced row marker is present in layout sourceMarkers or otherwise resolves through form/layout evidence, reset is false or harmless, and no other behavior remains.

legacyApis.name: document.getElementById / getElementsByName / getElementsByTagName
legacyApis.translationGuidance: Do not emit DOM calls. Infer the business intent only if the surrounding code clearly maps to targetApi or native formRules.
legacyApis.safeWhen: The DOM usage is only incidental to value/visibility/required behavior that can be expressed by MKXFORM APIs.

targetApiCapabilities.name: MKXFORM.getValue
targetApiCapabilities.notes: Normalize array/object/scalar values before comparing when legacy code used [0].

targetApiCapabilities.name: MKXFORM.setValue
targetApiCapabilities.notes: Use only for resolved target fields and safe value expressions.

targetApiCapabilities.name: MKXFORM.setFieldAttr
targetApiCapabilities.semantic: Set a main-field or row marker attribute: 3 required, 4 hide, 5 show, 6 not required.
targetApiCapabilities.notes: Good fit for legacy row visibility/required behavior when row markers are present.

targetApiCapabilities.name: MKXFORM.setDetailFieldAttr
targetApiCapabilities.notes: Use for detail table field attributes when the target id is table.field or otherwise evidenced.

targetApiCapabilities.name: MKXFORM.updateControlStyle
targetApiCapabilities.notes: Use for row-scoped detail visibility when the action has rowNum and a resolved detail control target.

allowedPatterns.description: If dslDraft.formRules.linkage with matching meta.sourceJsp fully covers the action behavior, patch function to empty string, translationStatus to omitted, functionMappings to native formRules evidence, and coverage.status to covered with residuals empty.

If targetApi JavaScript covers all source behavior, patch function, translationStatus mapped, functionMappings with semantic-translation/function-catalog/native-rule basis, and coverage.status translated with residuals empty.
If only part of the behavior is safe, do not patch to mapped. Leave needs_review/manual and emit diagnostics naming safe pieces and unresolved residuals.

forbiddenPatterns: new actions, deleted actions, changed action scope/controlId/tableId/event
coverage translated/covered when residual behavior remains
unknown or blocked MKXFORM target APIs

coverageStandards.translated: Generated MK JavaScript covers all source behavior for this action; residuals must be empty.
coverageStandards.covered: Native formRules cover all source behavior; function must be empty and residuals must be empty.
coverageStandards.partial: Native rules cover some behavior but residual JSP behavior remains.
coverageStandards.none: No source behavior was identified for coverage accounting.

fewShotExamples.sourceBehavior: onLoad callback only calls common_dom_row_set_show_required_reset("fd_jsx_row", false, false, false).
onLoad reads GetXFormFieldValueById("fd_cglx1")[0] and shows/requires fd_jsx_row only when the value equals D.
Value-change callback toggles a row and matching dslDraft.formRules.linkage already covers all effects.
Source walks all img/span/input elements to bind clicks or patch temporary-save display quirks.
fewShotExamples.safeOutcome: Do not patch to mapped. Leave needs_review/manual and emit diagnostics explaining unsupported DOM lifecycle behavior.
